revision.comment: Created page with "local i = {}; function i.InfoboxImage(args) -- if ustring.sub(args["image"],1,2) == "[[" then return args["image"]; -- else -- return args["image"]; -- ..."
prefix file while testing
image
size
size
check for file:/image: prefix
string.len(image)
add comment
add placeholder_image, code to come soon
Protected Module:InfoboxImage: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Block all non-admin users] (indefinite) [Move=Block all non-admin users] (indefinite))
add border option
add a few more exceptions that pass through
process parser parms better on example pages
update to supporess http links & pass through gallery or other tags
search for thumbnail images and add to tracking cat if found
add maxsize
update inputs descript ion
pass through
https exceptions
tidy sub code as per talk page
add upright
border doc
add center code from sandbox from [[User:Tlustulimu]] and also add title param
Undid revision 561051446 by [[Special:Contributions/WOSlinker|WOSlinker]] ([[User talk:WOSlinker|talk]])
add center code from sandbox from [[User:Tlustulimu]] and also add title param
if title blank then use alt
center
add thumbtime param
Changed protection level of Module:InfoboxImage: allow template editors to modify ([Edit=Protected template] (indefinite) [Move=Protected template] (indefinite))
add link param
per talk and [[WP:IPH]], consensus is to standard exclude
change as per request by [[User:Nullzero]] to make file & image prefixes work with other languages
another placeholder image
added a whole set of image placeholders from [[CAT:WIP]]
prevent script error when maxsize isn't a number
Add some from [[CAT:WIP]]
add a sanity check to help debug an intermittent error
add more asserts - this is still intermittently failing somewhere
Allow upright=yes to add "|upright" without a value (File:Name.png|frameless|upright). Tested with /sandbox and /testcases. Announced on talk page 7 days ago, no comments posted.
add page param from sandbox changes by [[User:Xover]]
use commons version of image
Image is needed male is already in the list, no need for having it twice
add extra strip marker test
add tracking for [[:Category:Pages using deprecated image syntax]] as per talk page request
add drafts with thumbnails to tracking category

Undid revision 755004686 by [[Special:Contributions/WOSlinker|WOSlinker]] ([[User talk:WOSlinker|talk]]). Per comment on talk page, this is flooding the category with Drafts that will never be articles.
add px to sizedefault if just a number
add Noimage.gif to placeholder list
make tracking category logic clearer, no net effect
Remove deleted category
do not use certain alt values as an image description
Undid revision 1010826525 by [[Special:Contributions/WOSlinker|WOSlinker]] ([[User talk:WOSlinker|talk]])
do not use certain alt values as an image description
if title param contains any templatestyles then do not use title
don't use alt as a title when title not set
add class param from sandbox as per edit request
update strip maker detection as per request on talk page
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:InfoboxImage]]: importing template for usage on this wiki. It is used a lot
per talk
update with [[User:Hike395]]'s changes from sandbox as well
fix tracking cat bug, don't track in user or draft space
draft is valid and users should be informed that there is an error with what they are doing
exclude user talk from tracking
1 revision imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:InfoboxImage]]
exclude user talk from tracking
1 revision imported: more imports
exclude user talk from tracking
1 revision imported: I hope this actually fixes things
83 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:InfoboxImage]]: Import just to get the source
exclude user talk from tracking
exclude user talk from tracking
1 revision imported

Changed protection settings for "[[Module:InfoboxImage]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]] ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))

1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 2 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Module:InfoboxImage]]
